fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Default next output sorts by furthest-progressed state first (closest to done = highest rank), then by priority, then by creation date. 2. State ordering uses the schema's states list index. 3. next includes tickets in ANY non-terminal state (not just ready) by default. 4. --where state=<X> filter restricts to a specific state. 5. Backward-compatible: existing --filter and --limit flags work unchanged.
fields.title: [ticket-system] Next command: sort by workflow progress
